components.role: three nominal 2x4 triangle members with 60-degree off-square end cuts

dimensions.reference_semantics: Equilateral triangle; each outside edge is the long-point-to-long-point outside face edge and is 48 in. Each member presents its 3.5 in face in the triangle plane and is 1.5 in deep.

architecture.part_topology: Three equal nominal 2x4 members forming one closed equilateral ring.
architecture.joint_family: Three 60-degree included corners, each made by paired 60-degree-off-square end cuts and a glued miter.
architecture.orientation: The 3.5 in lumber faces lie in one plane; the 1.5 in thickness is normal to that plane.
architecture.support_installation_model: Low-consequence decorative shop assembly with no site attachment or structural duty.
